message:
fix(ci): prevent nested archives and generate consolidated SHA256SUMS

Two dist workflow improvements:

1. Tarball creation now copies binaries into a flat staging directory and
   validates they are actual executables (ELF/Mach-O) before archiving.
   This prevents accidentally nesting a .tar.gz inside the .tar.xz.

2. The release job now generates a consolidated SHA256SUMS file alongside
   the per-artifact .sha256 sidecars, giving the installer a reliable
   fallback checksum source.

Fixes #37

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -70,11 +70,21 @@ jobs:
       - name: Create tarball (Unix)
         if: runner.os != 'Windows'
         run: |
-          mkdir -p dist
+          mkdir -p dist staging
           TARBALL="mcp-agent-mail-${{ matrix.target }}.tar.xz"
-          cd target/${{ matrix.target }}/release
-          tar -cJf "../../../dist/$TARBALL" mcp-agent-mail am
-          cd ../../../dist
+          # Copy raw binaries into a flat staging dir to guarantee no nested archives
+          cp "target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/mcp-agent-mail" staging/
+          cp "target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/am" staging/
+          # Verify the files are ELF/Mach-O binaries, not archives
+          for f in staging/mcp-agent-mail staging/am; do
+            mime=$(file --brief --mime-type "$f")
+            case "$mime" in
+              application/x-executable|application/x-mach-binary|application/x-pie-executable|application/x-sharedlib) ;;
+              *) echo "ERROR: $f has unexpected type '$mime' — refusing to package" >&2; exit 1 ;;
+            esac
+          done
+          tar -cJf "dist/$TARBALL" -C staging mcp-agent-mail am
+          cd dist
           shasum -a 256 "$TARBALL" > "$TARBALL.sha256"
 
       - name: Create zip (Windows)
@@ -125,6 +135,13 @@ jobs:
             cosign sign-blob --yes --bundle "${f}.sigstore.json" "$f"
           done
 
+      - name: Generate consolidated SHA256SUMS
+        run: |
+          cd dist
+          shasum -a 256 mcp-agent-mail-*.tar.xz mcp-agent-mail-*.zip 2>/dev/null > SHA256SUMS || true
+          echo "=== SHA256SUMS ==="
+          cat SHA256SUMS
+
       - name: Copy install scripts to dist
         run: |
           cp install.sh dist/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No install.sh found"
